name: scalascript-wallet-vault-encrypted-js
description: Test-time npm dependencies for the wallet-vault-encrypted Scala.js module. The Scala.js Node test runner walks up from `js/target/scala-*/.../main.js` to find `node_modules`; these mirror crypto-noble-js so the noble CryptoBackend can resolve Argon2id / PBKDF2 / AES-GCM at test time.
